case_title: CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. vs. BRESSI, JAMES IND/DBA BRESSI AND CO. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $146.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT BRESSI, JAMES IND/DBA BRESSI AND CO.
